section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an order for a test/procedure rather than a completed result; per template semantics, orders belong in the Plan section.

The same Zoloft 50mg daily is already documented as the patient's current medication in the Subjective section; repeating it here as an order implies a new or changed prescription, which is misleading. There is no indication of a change in dose or initiation, so this should be reflected as part of the ongoing treatment in the Assessment rather than a new Plan action.
